SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractChartsPanel
An abstract base panel responsible for managing and displaying a collection of graphical charts.
AnomaliesDetectionService<T>
Service interface defining operations for training anomaly detection models and evaluating datasets to identify abnormal financial records.
AnomaliesDetectionServiceFactory
Factory class responsible for configuring, validating, and instantiating concrete implementations of the AnomaliesDetectionService.
AnomalyDetectionException
Thrown to indicate that an error occurred during the training, processing, or execution of the anomaly detection algorithms.
AnomalyResult<T>
Represents the structured result of an anomaly detection evaluation on a specific financial data row.
ApiClient
Centralized HTTP client responsible for managing and sending API requests within the application.
ApiClientException
 
ApiException
Thrown to indicate that a remote API server processed a request but returned an unsuccessful response or error status code (typically >= 400).
ApiServerException
 
AppColors
A central style registry defining the consistent color palette used across the application user interface.
AppState
Holds the centralized operational runtime state of the application.
BaseAnomaliesDetectionService<T>
Concrete implementation of AnomaliesDetectionService that utilizes the Smile library's IsolationForest algorithm to detect structural deviations and anomalies within financial datasets.
BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel<T>
An abstract generic panel tasked with configuring parameters, triggering execution, and visually representing anomaly detection processes.
BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
Concrete implementation of the BaseAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing raw sequential pricing data mapped to the DataRecord structure.
BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Concrete implementation of the BaseAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing computed technical analysis structures mapped to the FinancialIndicators dto.
BoldLabel
A customized JLabel that forces its display text to be bold.
CardPanel
A customized JPanel designed to mimic a modern visual card component.
Controller
The main controller of the application, acting as the orchestrator between the user interface layer, the application state, and the background services (data fetching, indicator calculation, and anomaly detection).
CsvStorageService
Service utility layer responsible for handling persistent disk input/output operations.
DataParsingException
Thrown when the application fails to parse, map, or deserialize raw incoming data into the expected domain object models.
DataRecord
A data transfer and storage dto object representing a single snapshot of financial OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) data for a given timestamp.
DataRecordAnomalyDetectionPanel
Concrete specialization of BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel aimed at configuring and visually inspecting anomalies found in raw pricing records (OHLCV).
DataSourceParser
Service provider interface definition for mapping raw API JSON response structures into application domain object models.
DataSourceService
Core interface responsible for abstracting remote connection handshakes and pulling historical data metrics from specialized external financial market data providers.
DynamicChartContainer
A dynamic GUI container that manages and renders a collection of JFreeChart objects within a flexible layout.
FinancialIndicators
A storage container entity grouping calculated strategic technical analysis indicator metrics.
FinancialIndicatorsAnomalyDetectionPanel
Concrete specialization of BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel aimed at configuring and visually inspecting structural anomalies detected on mathematical technical analysis indicators.
FinancialIndicatorsPeriods
Handles the configuration, validation, and parsing of calculation period windows required by various financial technical indicator calculations.
FinancialValuesPanel
An interactive graphical panel tasked with configuring time periods and visualizing the trends of main technical analysis indicators (RSI, MACD, ATR, CMF).
FloatingMessage
A utility class that spawns transient, non-blocking notification windows above the UI.
FullScreenFrame
A specialized JFrame that provides built-in support for full-screen mode toggling.
IndicatorsService
Service for calculating and managing financial technical indicators.
IndicatorsServiceImpl
Concrete implementation of the IndicatorsService responsible for processing financial data records and executing mathematical models to compute traditional technical analysis indicators.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.AtrCalculator
Internal mathematical engine modeling market volatility via Average True Range (ATR) metrics.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator
Internal mathematical engine implementing Chaikin Money Flow (CMF) metrics.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator
Internal mathematical engine parsing price moving convergence and divergence (MACD) attributes.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator.EmaCalculator
Utility class tracking independent Exponential Moving Average calculations using standard smoothing multipliers.
IndicatorsServiceImpl.RsiCalculator
Internal mathematical engine evaluating directional velocity dynamics via Relative Strength Index (RSI) metrics.
InvisiblePanel
A customized JPanel subclass configured to be non-opaque.
LabeledComponent
A structural UI wrapper that places a bold descriptive label side-by-side with any input component.
LoggerUtil
Global logging framework engine utility providing pre-configured standard diagnostic output channels.
Main
 
MainPage
The master application layout coordinator initializing top-level window structures.
MenuPanel
A composite dashboard selector container that switches view visibility between modules.
MenuTabButton
A highly tailored header navigation tab navigation component that extends JButton.
NetworkException
Thrown when an I/O or connectivity failure occurs while attempting to establish a connection or transmit data to a remote API server.
PaddingConstants
A central constants warehouse specifying standardized spacing and layout padding configurations.
PrimaryButton
A customized standard action execution button utilizing rounded configurations.
QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService<T>
Quantum-inspired anomaly detection service.
QuantumDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
Concrete implementation of the QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing raw sequential pricing data evaluated as DataRecord structures.
QuantumFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Concrete implementation of the QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing computed technical analysis metrics structured as FinancialIndicators.
ResultsChartsPanel
A container panel specialized in loading and displaying historical linear time series of financial asset prices (Opens, Closures, Highs, Lows, Volumes).
ScrollablePanel
A JPanel extension that implements the Scrollable interface to provide specialized viewport behaviors when embedded inside a JScrollPane.
SearchPanel
An analytical configuration form panel handling historical asset metadata ingestion criteria.
StyledBarChart
A customized bar chart implementation that inherits core styling from StyledChart.
StyledChart
An abstract base class for customized JFreeChart charts within the application.
StyledChartPanel
A Swing GUI component container for holding and displaying JFreeChart objects.
StyledLineChart
A customized line chart implementation that inherits core styling from StyledChart.
TimeSeriesRow
Represents a standard, unified contract for any time-series data row within the system.
TitleLabel
A customized header title label that relies on FlatLaf semantics for consistent font scales.
UnderlinedComboBox<E>
A customized generic drop-down selection list box styled with a minimalist bottom underline instead of standard full borders.
UnderlinedDateTimePicker
A sleek, flat-designed version of the DateTimePicker widget.
UnderlinedTextField
A customized text input component styled with a minimalist bottom underline instead of a boxed frame.
ValidationException
Thrown when user input configurations, parameters, or dates fail to meet the application's business requirements and structural validation rules.
YahooFinanceParser
Concrete implementation of DataSourceParser tailored to handle and map the JSON payload responses specifically returned by the Yahoo Finance API.
YahooFinanceService
Concrete implementation of DataSourceService interacting with Yahoo Finance to source historical asset equity metrics.
